codeReview.summary: Round 11 re-review confirms all 4 prior blocking issues from round 10 have been FIXED. The original feature commit f67e508 had incorrect LSP tool names and argument formats, but these were corrected in fix commit 9c1b01e. The current code (HEAD 114b53e) now correctly interfaces with mcp-language-server.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fix for LSP tool names was properly implemented in a separate commit (9c1b01e) after the initial feature. The AGENTS.md guidance about verifying MCP tool names against actual server implementation was likely followed for the fix.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Commit 9c1b01e shows comprehensive changes aligning tool names and argument formats with mcp-language-server interface

sharedStateObservations.observation: The library file .factory/library/mcp-server-tools.md documents the actual mcp-language-server tools correctly. The fix applied this knowledge.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Current code at HEAD 114b53e correctly uses rename_symbol, removed non-existent tools, and uses proper filePath/line/column format

summary: PASS - All 4 blocking issues from round 10 have been resolved. The LSP tool names (rename_symbol, definition, references, hover, diagnostics) and argument formats (filePath, line, column) now match mcp-language-server's actual interface. Non-existent tools (workspace_diagnostics, document_symbols) were removed.
